props_visible: Gold flatware set at each place (gold/brass finish spoon, fork)
Terracotta clay vases with dried wheat/botanical arrangements
Brass/gold tall vase with white flowers
Small woven bread baskets (with fried items/bread visible in center)
notable_visual_elements: Gold cutlery elevates beyond restaurant standard to wedding/event banquet level
Terracotta vases + dried botanicals = Najdi earth aesthetic — natural/agricultural materials
Multiple flower arrangements create visual rhythm down the full table length
This level of table setting signals private dining events, corporate bookings, or special occasions
Warm lantern light makes the entire table glow like a feast invitation

hospitality_cues: Full banquet table with gold cutlery and florals = Saudi celebration hosting at its most generous
Terracotta vases with dried wheat = agricultural/harvest abundance symbolism
cultural_notes.free_notes: This is @aseeb.najd communicating its private dining and events capability. The combination of terracotta (earthy/Najdi) + gold cutlery (premium/celebratory) + dried botanicals (natural/heritage) is a deliberate Saudi event aesthetic language. Showing the table empty but fully set is a classic events marketing shot: 'your gathering could look like this.'

pattern_matches.notes: Long table perspective (oblique angle not overhead) — full table staging as hero
Event-ready table communicates capacity and aesthetic for group bookings
